query: What is the currency used in Sevastopol?
answer_summary: The currency used in Sevastopol is the Russian Ruble (RUB).

query: What is the current population of Simferopol?
answer_summary: As of 2026, the estimated population of Simferopol is approximately 339,000 to 339,500 residents. query: Who is the current head of government in Crimea?
answer_summary: As of April 2026, Sergey Aksyonov serves as the Head of the Republic of Crimea, a position he has held since 2014. In September 2024, he was re-elected by the State Council of Crimea for another five-year term, extending his tenure until September 2029. ([friendsofcrimea.com](https://friendsofcrimea.com/uploads/2026/CreimeaRefBookEN.pdf?utm_source=openai))  The Head of the Republic of Crimea is the highest official in the region, overseeing the executive branch, known as the Council of Ministers. query: What mobile phone operators work in Crimea?
answer_summary: As of April 2026, several mobile phone operators provide services in Crimea:  1. **K-Telecom (Win Mobile)**: Operating under the Win Mobile brand, K-Telecom has been active in Crimea since 2014. It offers GSM, UMTS, and LTE services across the peninsula. ([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/K-Telecom?utm_source=openai))  2. **Miranda-Media**: Initially providing fixed-line internet services, Miranda-Media launched its mobile network in Crimea and Sevastopol in May 2024. query: How do I get a visa to visit Crimea?
answer_summary: Visiting Crimea involves a unique set of regulations due to the political situation. Here’s a general outline of the process:  ### For Ukrainian Entry 1. **Check with Ukrainian Authorities**: Crimea is internationally recognized as part of Ukraine, so you might need a Ukrainian visa, depending on your nationality. 2. **Entry Restrictions**: Ukraine has restrictions on entering Crimea from Russia. query: What is the average salary in Sevastopol?
answer_summary: As of 2024, the average monthly nominal wage in Sevastopol was reported at 57,863.1 Russian rubles (RUB), an increase from 47,638.0 RUB in 2023. ([ceicdata.com](https://www.ceicdata.com/en/russia/average-monthly-wages-by-region/average-monthly-nominal-wages-sf-city-of-sevastopol?utm_source=openai)) This equates to approximately $507 USD per month in 2023, based on exchange rates at that time. query: What flights go to Simferopol airport?
answer_summary: As of April 2026, Simferopol International Airport (SIP) in Crimea remains closed to regular civilian flights due to ongoing security concerns and regional conflicts. All flights have been suspended since February 24, 2022, following the Russian invasion of Ukraine. ([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Simferopol_International_Airport?utm_source=openai))  Prior to its closure, the airport primarily offered domestic flights within Russia, with destinations including Moscow and Saint Petersburg.
